commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=aba31984fe6ccfd8e230ee0f6fceb2d18d88374d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds schedule-first/message-second cron add/create parsing, webhook delivery on cron add/create/edit, stale chat-delivery cleanup when switching to webhook, regression tests, and cron docs examples.

PR surface: Source +110, Tests +167, Docs +30. Total +307 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: the branch sets webhook delivery from the CLI, while current main-session cron execution only enqueues a system event and isolated runs own dispatchCronDelivery. I did not run a live Gateway webhook reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose the supported main-session webhook semantics and require real behavior proof before this public cron CLI feature can merge.

target.title: feat: improve cron create delivery ergonomics
target.body:
## Summary

- Add Hermes-style `openclaw cron create "0 2 * * *" "prompt" --name ...` parsing for cron expressions, `every <duration>` intervals, durations, and timestamps while preserving the existing flagged create path.
- Keep `--webhook <url>` delivery on `cron add/create` and `cron edit`, with conflicts against chat delivery flags.
- Clear stale chat delivery fields when an existing cron job switches to webhook delivery.
- Update cron CLI and scheduled-task docs with positional schedule/prompt examples and webhook examples.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/cli/cron-cli.test.ts src/cron/service.jobs.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm check:changed` on Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01ksrnqfkke2ee7mbv611csvad` / run `26612582390`
- `pnpm check:docs`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: cron creation can use the Hermes-style schedule-first and prompt-second command shape, plus webhook delivery without hand-editing job JSON or relying on undocumented delivery fields.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout plus delegated Blacksmith Testbox changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test src/cli/cron-cli.test.ts src/cron/service.jobs.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`; `pnpm check:changed`; `pnpm check:docs`; `git diff --check`; autoreview local and branch diff.

Evidence after fix: cron CLI regression tests assert positional cron schedules, positional `every 1h` schedules, positional prompt conflicts, positional names, webhook add/create payloads, webhook edit payloads, and mixed webhook/chat delivery errors. Cron service regression tests assert switching to webhook delivery clears chat-only fields.

Observed result after fix: all targeted tests and changed gates passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: live Gateway cron execution against an external webhook endpoint.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
